segment.source: Renders a compact sidebar panel with a table of contents: each item has a label, a manually entered anchor ID, and an h2/h3 level that controls indentation, beneath an optional panel title. Use it for: long articles, documentation, legal texts, guides, whitepapers — any source document with many headings readers should jump between. Anchors are maintained by hand; prefer 'Menu: Section Index' to generate the list automatically from page content.
